steps.title: Separate the film series
steps.content: The sentence lists three films matched respectively with three filmmakers: Zoot Suit, El Norte, and Stand and Deliver. The blank must separate the first film from the second and leave the second separated from the third.

steps.title: Use series commas
steps.content: A lacks a comma after the first film's year, so the first two film titles run together. B lacks both needed separators, and C turns the second film into a parenthetical interruption rather than a normal series item. Commas after the first and second film years correctly punctuate the series. The answer is D.
